name: Clear Creek Family Activity Center
description: Clear Creek Family Activity Center is a place to play pickleball in Shelbyville, KY. There are 3 outdoor hard and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are private.

name: Shelby Christian Church
description: Shelby Christian Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Shelbyville, KY. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.
